name: radar-suite
description: Six-skill audit suite for iOS/Swift codebases: data models, UI paths, data round-trips, time bombs, visual quality, and capstone grading. As of v2.0 every finding is classified on a 3-axis framework (real bug / scatter / dead code) with mandatory coaching citations to patterns in the audited codebase.

skills.name: radar-suite-axis-classification
skills.description: Shared axis classification framework. Every radar invokes this before emitting findings. Defines the 3 axes (axis_1_bug, axis_2_scatter, axis_3_dead_code/smelly), verification checklist (reachability, whole-file scan, branch enumeration, pattern citation lookup, source root introspection), coaching schema with mandatory file:line citations, and the schema gate rules.

skills.name: radar-suite
skills.description: Orchestrator and entry point. Routes to individual radars, runs full audit sequences, manages the unified ledger, handles session preferences, checkpoint/resume, and cross-skill handoffs.

skills.name: data-model-radar
skills.description: Audits SwiftData and Core Data models for field completeness, serialization gaps, relationship integrity, and migration safety. Foundation layer — run before other radars for best results.

skills.name: ui-path-radar
skills.description: Traces UI paths in SwiftUI and UIKit apps. Five-layer audit with 30 issue categories: discovers entry points, traces user flows, detects dead ends and broken promises, evaluates UX impact, verifies data wiring. Every category has a default axis classification with reclassification rules.

skills.name: roundtrip-radar
skills.description: Per-workflow audit that traces data end-to-end through complete user journeys. Verifies fields survive the full round-trip from UI to model to persistence and back. Emits full_path_trace verification logs that show every hop.

skills.name: time-bomb-radar
skills.description: Finds deferred operations that crash on aged data. Six temporal patterns: deferred deletes, cache TTL, trial expiry, accumulation, date arithmetic, scheduled events. Almost all findings are axis_1_bug by nature.

skills.name: ui-enhancer-radar
skills.description: Systematic SwiftUI UI audit with design intent interview and 11-domain analysis including a colorblind-safe Color Audit domain. Supports batch mode and adaptive view profiles.

skills.name: capstone-radar
skills.description: Aggregator and gap filler. Consumes companion handoffs, owns 5 grep-reliable domains, produces unified A-F grading with a ship/no-ship decision. As of v2.0 produces a two-section report: 'Fix Before Shipping' (axis_1 only, counts toward grade) and 'Hygiene Backlog' (axis_2/3, does not affect grade).
